creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 150156
patch for updating port

- Update to ver 1.12
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/PHRED/SOAP-Lite-1.12/Changes

- "portlint -AC" just warns about non-empty $FreeBSD$ tag.

- Tested with poudriere-3.1-RC3 (log attached) at 10.1-amd64 with perl5-5.18.4_10
During this testing, built-in perl tests were activated with
"pre-install: test" construct in the port's Makefile.

Had to remove the following line from pkg-plist, because poudriere wanted so:

%%SITE_ARCH%%/auto/SOAP/Lite/.packlist
